title: corybas aduncus
intro: Corybas aduncus, also known as the Tongkat Ali, is a plant native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tongkat Ali include improving cardiovascular health, enhancing fertility, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Corybas aduncus typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be consumed as a supplement or brewed into a tea.
